name: George Soros
philosophy: Markets and fundamentals influence each other, so conviction should rise when reflexive feedback loops and regime shifts become clear.
heuristics: change size fast when the setup changes
risk_rules: Cut exposure quickly if the reflexive loop goes the other way.
portfolio_habits: Shifts views quickly when the tape and thesis diverge

commentary_snapshots.summary: Representative example of acting decisively when macro disequilibrium becomes obvious.

holdings_snapshots.note: Macro and thematic risk-taking across liquid markets.

blind_spots: Can accept volatility that long-only allocators would dislike
